query: intentional camera movement abstract blur swirl impressionistic photo
message: sub:intentional_blur/ICM_abstract — anti_aesthetic — swirl, zoom blur, vertical pan, painterly motion abstraction

response.objective_caption: Overlapping forms in vibrant pink, magenta, orange, yellow, white, and green tones fill the frame, suggesting floral or organic shapes in close proximity with soft, diffuse edges and blended color transitions.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract composition created through intentional extreme motion blur, where overlapping floral or organic forms in vibrant pink, magenta, orange, yellow, white, and green dissolve into soft, diffuse shapes with no sharp detail or distinguishable edges, rendering the subjects as color and gesture rather than recognizable botanical forms.
